---
title: "Publications"
---

## Manuscripts

### Stochastic dynamics can drive large differences in researcher productivity

**Sam Zhang, Samantha Magid, Aanjaneya Kumar, Daniel B. Larremore, Aaron Clauset**

Manuscript in preparation.

This work develops and evaluates scholar-agnostic generative models of scientific productivity, with particular attention to self-excitation, inactivity, rank persistence, and heavy-tailed changes in annual output.

## Preprints

Preprints will be listed here as they become available.

## Talks and presentations

Talks and presentations will be linked here as they come available.

## Posters

Posters and conference materials will be added here.

## Software and data

Research code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/crabwife).

Replication materials and archived releases will be linked alongside the corresponding manuscripts.
